title: Drone strike hits US consulate parking lot in Dubai
author: Sophie Brams
fullText: A fire in the parking lot of a building near the U.S. consulate in Dubai has been put out following a drone strike. No one was injured, according to the Dubai Media Office. “Dubai authorities reaffirm their commitment to ensuring everyone’s safety and security,” a post on the social platform X stated. Officials posted earlier…
